subject: Possible GRB030113 seen by SPI ACS
body:
--------------AB7AAF9CCE11B3A395EB1981 Content-Type: text/plain; charset=us-ascii Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit The ISDC Shift Team and the INTEGRAL SPI-ACS GRB team reports: A possible GRB has been seen in the INTEGRAL SPI-ACS light curve on 03-01-13 at 10:54:50 UT. The duration of the GRB is very short at approx. 0.15s. No position information is available. The lightcurve is available at: ftp://isdcarc.unige.ch/arc/FTP/ibas/spiacs/2003-01-13T10-54-50.0000-00000-00000.lc --------------AB7AAF9CCE11B3A395EB1981 Content-Type: text/html; charset=us-ascii Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit The ISDC Shift Team and the INTEGRAL SPI-ACS GRB team reports:

A possible GRB has been seen in the INTEGRAL SPI-ACS light curve on
 03-01-13 at 10:54:50 UT. The duration of the GRB is very short at
 approx. 0.15s. No position information is available. The lightcurve
 is available at:
ftp://isdcarc.unige.ch/arc/FTP/ibas/spiacs/2003-01-13T10-54-50.0000-00000-00000.lc
  --------------AB7AAF9CCE11B3A395EB1981--
